module.name: clock
module.description: Live wall-clock that shows the current time and ticks every second. Fixed width so it never reflows. Movable on the preview in Edit layout; resize is horizontal-only. Interactive: it never advances the slide.

snippet.label: Clock (24h)
snippet.description: Live clock. format: 24 | 12, seconds: true | false, size: sm | md | lg | xl.

snippet.label: Clock (12h, large)
snippet.description: 12-hour clock with AM/PM, no seconds, large.
